## Proposal

Describe the enhancement.

## Why It Helps

Explain the user, maintainer, or engineering value.

## Suggested Design

Describe the smallest useful implementation you have in mind.

## Safety Notes

Call out any scope, abuse, or false-positive risks if relevant.
